reviews.review_description:
I got this game when it was on sale for 30p .
I got my 9 year old grandson to play it over the weekend and we never laughed so much , watching him bob his head and strut around like a pigeon 🤣 😂  , I even fooled him into cooing and flapping his arms , he loved it 
Great game for kids to play .

Bought it when it was on sale for under $1. Played it once for maybe 5 mins and never again. Funny to describe the mechanics when people are trying my quest, but no one ever wants to actually try it. You’ll get a good laugh either way though.

The head control is somewhat interesting, but the constant bobbing makes me sick after a few minutes, and it's hard to aim. The game is also pretty simple, at least in the first few minutes. It's too uncomfortable to play for more than a few minutes.

I’m not going to lie and say this is the best game I’ve played but it is at least trying to be different and is well made. I enjoyed it but it’s not a game I’d play very often but for the price of a cheap coffee it’s worth a play and has a nice charm to it.
I give it 5 stars based on these points. There’s nothing really wrong with it , maybe the control could be a bit more responsive but hey, maybe that’s what being a pigeon feels like.
If you want something to entertain you for half hour at a cheap af price give it a go.
I won’t refund it as I want to encourage developers and as I said it’s not bad.

This game can work even better ,if you could use the controller to move.
Why not have random conversational nps walking around while you the pigeon try to get food. Smh,I got it for less than 50 cents…I can’t
 wait for update.
I've only played for a few minutes so far, but it is really funny :D For three bucks it is definitely worth buying if you like pigeons (or if you don't!)
